title: Hig
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Hig |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]''[[The New Rebellion]]'' |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=Blue |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*[[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]]''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *Slender bodies |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|I told you not to hit the ships.''"
"''Sorry, sir. Precision shooting is for A-wings.''"
"''Missing a target the size of a moon shouldn't be difficult, Ginbotham.|Gen. Antilles and Ginbotham, during the Battle of Almania|}} The '''Hig''' were a slender, blue-colored [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The Hig [[Ginbotham]] served aboard the [[Yavin (starship)|''Yavin'']] under [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' command, and saw [[Battle of Almania|action]] against the forces of the terrorist [[Kueller]] at [[Almania]]. [[Unidentified Hig trader|Another Hig]] was a supporter of the [[Diversity Alliance]], a pro-[[Alien/Legends|alien]], anti-[[Human/Legends|Human]] organization, donating her [[Ore/Legends|ore]] [[Starship/Legends|hauler]] to the cause. ==Biology and appearance== The Hig were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with blue skin and slender bodies. ==History== The Hig were active in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from at least the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Rebellion]]'' to [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. a Hig known as [[Ginbotham]] served in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Forces]]. He was renowned for his [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] skills and served as part of the command crew aboard the [[Yavin (starship)|''Yavin'']], a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. While serving aboard the ''Yavin'', Ginbotham saw action at the [[Battle of Almania]], where the Republic engaged three [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] under the command of the terrorist [[Kueller]]. Ginbotham was ordered to fire at one of the Republic's allied ships, the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'', in order to confuse the opponent's [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-operated forces into mistaking the ''Yavin'' for one of their own ships. Later, in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]'' to [[24 ABY]]. a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Unidentified Hig trader|member]] of the Hig species donated the use of a robotic [[Ore/Legends|ore]] [[Starship/Legends|hauler]] to the [[Diversity Alliance]]. The Alliance was a coalition of pro-[[Alien/Legends|alien]] groups, led by [[Nolaa Tarkona]], that aimed to displace [[Human/Legends|Humans]] from significant positions of power throughout the galaxy. The Hig trader's spacecraft was used at their mining operations on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. While she occasionally flew the spacecraft there herself, more frequently she relied on the autopilot to complete her cargo runs, remaining behind in [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]] on backwater worlds. On one particular occasion, her spacecraft was used as cover by four members of the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] who wanted infiltrate the Diversity Alliance operations on Ryloth. They attached a small craft, the ''[[Rock Dragon]]'', to one of the hauler's cargo bays as a decoy, and hid themselves inside the ore hauler, escaping from the ship once they made planetfall.''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]'' ==Behind the scenes== The Hig were created by [[Kristine Kathryn Rusch]] and first appeared in her novel ''[[The New Rebellion]]'', published in [[1996]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Hig]] }}
